name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-studio-core
description: MyndHyve Ads Studio core — four pure-logic executors lifted from src/canvas-types/campaign-studio/nodes/adsStudioPack/. ads.brief.build (CreativeBriefBuilder), ads.variant.plan (VariantPlanService), ads.video.qa (VideoQAService), ads.winner.synthesize (WinnerSynthesisService). All four executors are deterministic — no host capabilities required beyond the core NodeContext. Marks the Phase A pilot of the canvas-type executor migration per openwop/openwop#11.
author: MyndHyve
